name: stitch
description: Codex plugin wrapper for the Google Stitch remote MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to the Stitch remote MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Adds the Stitch remote MCP server to Codex using the API-key authentication flow from Stitch documentation.
defaultPrompt: List my Stitch projects using MCP tools.
Generate a new Stitch screen from a product prompt.
Create design variants for the selected Stitch screens.
